text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the autumn Tenno Sho is here. Gold
Ship's rival, Tosen Jordan, is set to participate as
well.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're going to make chestnuts stuffed
with sea urchin—aka Surprise in a Shell! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Surprise! Though they look like ordinary
chestnuts, the innards are totally different! ☆ You
should try to surprise your opponent during a
race too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship's competitive spirit is strong as ever...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I have to wonder if she remembers she's going
up against Tosen Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What're you lookin' at? Wanna have a chestnut
knuckle sandwich?
choice_data_list: Jordan will be out there today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! That's today! I totally forgot today is the
big one!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: By the way, on an unrelated note...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Is there a rule against pelting people with
chestnuts during the race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I confiscate every single one of Gold Ship's
chestnuts on the spot.
